_comment: JFK 2024-07-16 afternoon convective GDP. GDP clearance hold is applied when aircraft reaches runway threshold (~35 min after scheduled departure). Phase timing accounts for this lag so scheduled-hour buckets align correctly. Normal taxi-out: 19-23 min. GDP onset affects 13:xx departures (threshold ~15:xx = 840 min), peaks at 17:xx (1020 min), then sustained through end of day.
_calibration: Phases defined in terms of simulation time when aircraft ARRIVE AT RUNWAY THRESHOLD, not scheduled departure time.

programs.description: Initial GDP buildup — gradual restriction as convective weather develops
Intensifying GDP — weather worsening, departure rate severely restricted
Peak GDP — maximum restriction, large backlog accumulated
Sustained late GDP — weather decaying but backlog persists through evening
